overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring the protagonist V walking through the futuristic Night City downtown. The character passes an NCPD police vehicle, walks along corporate sidewalks, ascends outdoor stairs, and traverses a covered pedestrian corridor with reflective floors and neon accents.

events.description: approaching NCPD police armored vehicle with officers standing guard

agents.ego_description: walking through city street approaching a police checkpoint near the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: police officer standing guard next to armored personnel carrier

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with glass facade dominating the skyline
dark armored police vehicle with NCPD markings parked on the street
white zebra stripes painted on the asphalt road surface
modern metallic street light with rectangular fixture
large electronic advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright futuristic city street with modern glass towers. The camera approaches a police APC parked at an intersection, with officers standing nearby. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and crosswalks in this open urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate sidewalk with planters and benches

events.description: passing police vehicle and moving onto the sidewalk along corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the police vehicle and approaching the Delamain building entrance

entered.detail: dark corporate building with illuminated Delamain logo signage
large rectangular planter containing trees and shrubs
modern metal seating along the sidewalk
elevated glass-enclosed walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the concrete sidewalk past the police vehicle, moving alongside the Delamain corporate building. Large planters with trees line the path, and an elevated pedestrian bridge is visible ahead connecting the futuristic glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase leading to elevated plaza

events.description: beginning to ascend wide outdoor staircase to upper plaza level
reaching top of stairs and entering the elevated plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing wide outdoor marble staircase to reach the upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs towards the camera

entered.detail: broad marble steps with integrated lighting leading upward
elevated open area with reflective flooring and surrounding towers

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide marble staircase leading to an upper plaza level. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs. The environment transitions from street level to an elevated pedestrian area with modern architecture and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with reflective flooring

events.description: entering covered walkway with tall pillars and highly reflective marble floor

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor with reflective floors passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall dark structural columns supporting the covered roof
highly polished white marble flooring reflecting lights and surroundings
overhead roof structure with integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian corridor with tall pillars and a highly reflective marble floor. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight but illuminated by natural light from the sides and artificial ceiling lights. Other pedestrians walk through this modern architectural passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor approaching exit to open plaza

events.description: passing neon Wild Blue Hotel sign on the right wall
approaching corridor exit with increasing natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through covered walkway approaching the bright exit at the end

entered.detail: illuminated teal neon sign reading Wild Blue Hotel on the corridor wall
bright opening at the end of the corridor leading to exterior plaza

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the covered corridor, passing a neon hotel sign and approaching the exit where bright daylight is visible. The pillars now line the left side as the corridor opens ahead to an exterior plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright futuristic city street that gradually ascends from a busy intersection to an elevated corporate plaza. It begins by approaching a police APC parked among glass towers, where officers stand amidst pedestrians crossing the open urban intersection. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts along a concrete sidewalk past the Delamain corporate building and rows of large planters, heading toward a distant elevated pedestrian bridge. The movement then transitions from the street level as the character climbs a wide marble staircase, passing other pedestrians descending the steps. Finally, the environment opens up into an upper plaza characterized by modern architecture and polished, reflective surfaces.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered architectural passage that gradually opens into a bright exterior plaza. It begins as the character enters a covered pedestrian corridor characterized by tall pillars and a highly reflective marble floor, where natural side-lighting blends with artificial ceiling glows. As the character advances through the modern space, the camera passes other pedestrians and a glowing neon hotel sign. The scene then shifts as the pillars align to the left, guiding the movement toward the corridor's end. Finally, the sheltered environment gives way to the brilliance of direct daylight as the character exits into the open city air.
